missingInfo: The CABLES section contains only drop cables from closures to buildings. No trunk cables are defined showing how closures connect to each other or to the source CO-1, making it impossible to determine the complete equipment path from B-0 back to the CO.

The representation provides explicit drop cables from closures to buildings, but does not provide explicit cable topology showing how closures interconnect to each other or to the source CO-1. Therefore, only the serving closure CL-A can be definitively identified on the path from B-0. The complete path to CO-1 cannot be fully determined from the given data.
